import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Front cell of agent in next state (where putdown places the object)
    dir_n = next_state.agent.direction
    dy_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    dx_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_n = ay_n + dy_n
    front_x_n = ax_n + dx_n

    # Distance from front cell to square (key for putdown placement)
    dist_front_sq_n = jnp.abs(front_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(front_x_n - sq_x_n)

    # Front cell in current state
    dir_s = state.agent.direction
    dy_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    dx_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_s = ay_s + dy_s
    front_x_s = ax_s + dx_s
    dist_front_sq_s = jnp.abs(front_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(front_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # Success: pyramid placed adjacent to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    # ---- PHASE 1: Not holding → approach pyramid ----
    dist_ap_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_ap_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)
    phase1 = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n)
    r_approach_pyr = phase1.astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_ap_s - dist_ap_n) / max_dist * 5.0

    # ---- PICKUP BONUS ----
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # ---- PHASE 2: Holding → position front cell adjacent to square ----
    # The agent needs front cell to be at distance 1 from square to place pyramid adjacent
    # Reward: reduce |dist_front_sq - 1|
    phase2 = holding_s & holding_n
    target_dist = 1.0
    err_s = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_s - target_dist)
    err_n = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_n - target_dist)
    r_phase2 = phase2.astype(jnp.float32) * (err_s - err_n) / max_dist * 5.0

    # Also: absolute reward for being in a good position to place (front cell adjacent to square)
    front_adj_sq_n = holding_n & (dist_front_sq_n <= 1.5) & (dist_front_sq_n >= 0.5)
    r_ready_to_place = front_adj_sq_n.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0

    # ---- PUTDOWN REWARD ----
    dist_pyr_sq_n_safe = jnp.where(pyr_on_grid_n, dist_pyr_sq_n, max_dist)
    placed_adj = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe <= 1.5)
    placed_near = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe <= 3.0)
    placed_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n_safe > 3.0)

    r_putdown = (
        placed_adj.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0
        + placed_near.astype(jnp.float32) * 0.5
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-1.0)
    )

    # ---- SUCCESS REWARD ----
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 20.0

    # ---- PERSISTENT SUCCESS: keep rewarding if already adjacent ----
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    was_adj = pyr_on_grid_s & (~holding_s) & (dist_pyr_sq_s >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_s <= 1.5)
    is_adj = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    r_persistent = (was_adj & is_adj).astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr
        + r_pickup
        + r_phase2
        + r_ready_to_place
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_persistent
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
